about_msg:
pdf_nwk v2.1.0
Golang + fyne

Image to PDF converter (very fast, low RAM usage)
Actually created for reading comics, supports 1 - thousands of images
User manual and newer versions can be found on GitHub below
Click on the Repositories tab and find the program name
